title: LifeStealZ Resourcepack
description: The First and Only Official Resourcepack for LifeStealZ
body:
# Official LifeStealZ Resourcepack

This is the official [LifeStealZ](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lifestealz) Resourcepack. This pack changes the heart items texture to an actual heart and makes the animation when using a heart possible.

If you want some preview images, check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lifestealzpack/gallery)!

## Compatibility

This pack is only compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.4 or later** and **LifeStealZ 2.14.0 or later**.

For this Resource Pack to work, you **do not** need Optifine!

## Bugs and Suggestions

If you find any bugs or want to suggest something, you can join our [Discord](https://strassburger.org/discord) and create a post in the suggestions channel with the LifeStealZ tag.
